title: Northwest Advanced Bio-Fuels Solves Aviation Industry Financing Dilemma Allowing for Widescale Use of Sustainable Synthetic Aviation Fuel
content: Northwest Advanced Bio-Fuels (NWABF), the developer of one of the United States' largest woody biomass sustainable synthetic aviation fuel (SAF) facilities, announced today a breakthrough financing structure that removes a long-standing barrier in the renewables industry in the United States: access to Engineering Services Development Capital (DEVCAP). This monumental pathway will allow for widescale use of nationally and internationally mandated Sustainable Synthetic Aviation Fuel (SAF) by airlines who fly across the globe.
author: Analysts Account
